mapper.insert: insert into platform_agents (id, name, system_prompt, model_id, memory_policy, knowledge_base_policy) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{systemPrompt}, #{modelId}, cast(#{memoryPolicyJson} as jsonb), cast(#{knowledgeBasePolicyJson} as jsonb))
mapper.select: select a.id, a.name, a.system_prompt, a.model_id, coalesce(string_agg(t.tool_id, ',' order by t.tool_id), '') as tool_ids_csv, cast(a.memory_policy as text) as memory_policy_json, cast(a.knowledge_base_policy as text) as knowledge_base_policy_json, a.created_at from platform_agents a left join platform_agent_tools t on t.agent_id = a.id where a.id = #{id} group by a.id, a.name, a.system_prompt, a.model_id, a.memory_policy, a.knowledge_base_policy, a.created_at
select a.id from platform_agents a inner join platform_agent_tools t on t.agent_id = a.id where t.tool_id = #{toolId} order by a.created_at desc limit 20

select id from platform_agents where jsonb_typeof(knowledge_base_policy - > 'collectionIds') = 'array' and knowledge_base_policy - > 'collectionIds' @> jsonb_build_array(#{collectionId}) order by created_at desc
